query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedUserId = 901752 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS alfonso_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedUserId = 902504 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evol_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedUserId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unassigned_leads
FROM contacts 
WHERE accountId = 390025;

  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedUserId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unassigned_leads
